title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners:
Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services South Asia Partners!
